style_a.name: 灰暗现实主义
style_a.prompt_suffix: handheld camera, film grain, desaturated cold tones, blue-grey color palette, urban isolation, dimly lit

style_b.name: 东方赛博神话
style_b.prompt_suffix: epic cyber mythology, golden and neon blue palette, weightless atmosphere, digital particles, majestic scale

music_sync.lyrics: 推开窗 城市的灯火依旧很拥挤 / 我的梦 藏在草稿纸里默默呼吸 一支笔 撑不起宏大的命题

atmosphere.overall_mood: 阴雨中的城市孤独感与工位上的挫败感交织，主角渺小如蚁
atmosphere.lighting: 霓虹灯在雨中散射的模糊光晕+室内昏暗台灯

video_prompt: POV shot pushing open window to reveal rainy neon city, then high angle of frustrated programmer crumpling paper at desk surrounded by paper ball piles, desaturated cold grey tones, film grain, melancholic urban loneliness, 16:9, 15s.

bgm.description: 主歌开始，轻柔吉他+电子底垫，旋律略带忧郁
bgm.instruments: 原声吉他、合成器pad、轻柔鼓组

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角的手推开老旧的窗户，窗框漆面剥落
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 从金色梦境切入灰色现实
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of hands pushing open an old window with peeling paint, revealing a rainy cityscape beyond, cold grey morning light, transition from golden to grey reality, film grain, handheld feel, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 窗外远景——阴雨中的城市天际线，密集高楼大厦，立交桥上车流如蚁
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Aerial view of a dense rainy city skyline with towering buildings and overpasses, tiny ant-like traffic below, neon lights bleeding through rain, time-lapse motion blur on vehicles, desaturated cold grey-blue tones, urban isolation atmosphere, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主观视角从窗户看出去，雨滴沿玻璃滑落，模糊了城市灯光
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 透过雨滴看世界，一切朦胧而遥远
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: POV through a rain-streaked window looking out at a blurred neon cityscape, raindrops sliding down glass distorting city lights below, bokeh effects, cold blue desaturated tones, sense of isolation and distance, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 切回室内，主角坐在工位前，面前摊着笔记本和草稿纸
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A young programmer sitting at a cramped workspace looking down at notebooks and draft papers, dim warm desk lamp as only light source, small cluttered room, contemplative mood, cold desaturated tones, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 特写——草稿纸上写满了涂改的文字和图表，笔尖在纸上犹豫
storyboard_9grid.lyrics_at_grid: 藏在草稿纸里默默呼吸

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 笔尖在纸上犹豫不决地涂画

storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Top-down close-up of draft papers covered with crossed-out writing and diagrams, a pen hesitating on the surface, dim lighting, the papers seem to breathe with potential, detailed paper texture, desaturated tones with hint of warmth, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角烦躁地将草稿纸揉成一团，动作带着压抑的情绪
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of a frustrated young man crumpling a piece of paper in his hands, expression showing frustration and defeat, dim room lighting, cold tones, emotional tension, film grain, handheld camera feel, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 纸团被丢向房间角落，角落已堆满了纸团，形成小山
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A crumpled paper ball being thrown towards a corner of a dark room already piled high with similar paper balls forming a small mountain, dim lighting, the paper balls seem to breathe subtly in the shadows, metaphorical visual, cold grey tones, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 俯拍——主角伏案的姿态，显现他在巨大桌面和纸堆中的渺小
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 从上方俯瞰——人在纸堆中如此渺小
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: High angle overhead shot of a young man slumped over a desk with head in hands, surrounded by scattered papers and crumpled balls, appearing tiny and overwhelmed from above, dark room with single desk lamp, desaturated cold tones, vulnerability and exhaustion, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 纸团堆特写——阴影中的纸团似乎在微微起伏呼吸，暗示梦想并未死去
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 在废墟中仍有生命的气息
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of crumpled paper balls in a dark corner subtly pulsing as if breathing, faint golden light flickering within the creases, a metaphor for dreams not yet dead, dark moody atmosphere with hint of warmth deep within, film grain, mysterious, 16:9 aspect ratio
